title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Akshaya Private Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Akshaya Private Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Akshaya Private Limited. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Sales Manager to strengthen our Nashik-based team.

About Akshaya Private Limited:
Akshaya Private Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Market Research

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Akshaya Private Limited!
